svg.title: WatchNext ML Pipeline: EDA → Feature Engineering → Models → API
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full ML pipeline from raw MovieLens data through EDA, feature engineering, three model types, ensemble, and FastAPI serving.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What files are in the MovieLens 25M dataset?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the EDA steps for MovieLens in detail')
g.text: Distribution · Sparsity · Cold-start · Bias · Temporal drift

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What features should I engineer for movie recommendations?')
g.text: User/item matrices · TF-IDF tags · Genre encoding · Temporal

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I implement SVD collaborative filtering for movie recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a content-based filtering model for movies?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a neural collaborative filtering model?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics should I use for a recommendation system?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the FastAPI serving layer for recommendations?')
